name: @intentsolutionsio/validate-plugin
description: Validates Claude Code plugin structure against official Anthropic spec and Intent Solutions enterprise standard

scripts.postinstall: node -e "console.log(\"\\n→ This npm package is a tracking/proof artifact. Install the plugin via:\\n  ccpi install validate-plugin\\n  or /plugin install validate-plugin@claude-code-plugins-plus in Claude Code\\n\")"
